title: AES: A Few Things To Like If You Are Comfortable With The Risk
text: The AES Corporation is one of the few utilities that operate in multiple countries, but it still enjoys the incredibly stable cash flows that we like to see from the sector. The company uses hedging to reduce its exposure to currency fluctuations, which we should be able to appreciate.

title: 13 Ideal Inflation-Busting March Dividend Dogs
text: March-April, 2022, UBS, Kiplinger, and Barrons analysts and reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as: “Inflation Busters.” Those five articles revealed 48 equities, with 43 paying dividends.
